title: The Philadelphia Experiment
author: Various proponents
content: The theory claims the US Navy accidentally rendered a destroyer invisible and teleported it during a 1943 experiment.
action: Secrecy often hides failed tech tests behind wild rumors.

title: The Denver Airport Conspiracy
author: Various researchers
content: The theory suggests the airport is a front for a massive underground base or a global elite command center.
action: Massive, opaque projects often mask restricted activity.

title: The HAARP Weather Control
author: Online discourse
content: The theory argues that high-frequency research facilities are secretly used to manipulate weather patterns and induce natural disasters.
action: Nations are highly motivated to master atmospheric control.

title: The Hollow Earth Theory
author: Historical speculation
content: The theory posits that the Earth is hollow and potentially home to advanced civilizations or hidden inner-earth gateways.
action: Lack of deep-earth exploration fuels extreme speculation.

title: The Reptilian Elite
author: David Icke
content: The theory claims that shape-shifting reptilian humanoids control global politics and major institutions.
action: Leaders' predatory behavior often gets painted as monstrous.
